projectDescription: Sealos is an AI-native Cloud Operating System built on Kubernetes that unifies the entire application lifecycle — from cloud IDE development to production deployment, managed databases, and AI infrastructure.
keyFeatures: DevBox: Cloud IDE with zero-setup development environments supporting multiple languages and frameworks
App Launchpad: One-click Docker image deployment with Kubernetes Deployments and Ingress
Managed Databases: Production-ready PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis clusters
Object Storage: Built-in S3-compatible object storage powered by MinIO
AI Proxy: Unified API gateway for multiple LLM providers with usage tracking
Cost Center: Usage-based billing with workspace-level resource quotas and invoicing
App Store/Templates: One-click deployment of complex applications without YAML
Kubernetes Lifecycle Management: Install, scale, and manage K8s clusters with the sealos CLI
Enterprise Multi-Tenancy: Workspace-based isolation with RBAC and resource quotas
High Availability: IPVS-based load balancing for production-grade clusters
publicApiSurface: POST /account/v1alpha1/invoice — Get and apply for invoices
sealos run — Deploy a cluster image or application
sealos apply — Apply a cluster image configuration
sealos add — Add nodes to a cluster
sealos delete — Remove nodes from a cluster
sealos reset — Reset and tear down a cluster
sealos build — Build a custom cluster image
sealos cert — Manage cluster TLS certificates
